case_title: KEVIN WOO VS. AMERICAN FAMILY CONNECT INSURANCE AGENCY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF KEVIN WOO ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU , IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN FAMILY CONNECT INSURANCE AGENCY, REPRESENTED BY SHERYL ZIMMERMAN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,841.62 FILED BY WOO, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FAMILY CONNECT INSURANCE AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-26-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN WOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN FAMILY CONNECT INSURANCE AGENCY IS NOT PRESENT. CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS REQUESTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FAMILY CONNECT INSURANCE AGENCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOO, KEVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN FAMILY CONNECT INSURANCE AGENCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
